items.name: Config
items.desc: Basic renderer configuration with eased scrolling.

fields.name: fontFamily
fields.desc: system family name; empty uses the platform default

fields.name: fontSize
fields.desc: base font size in logical pixels

fields.name: lineHeight
fields.desc: line-height as a multiple of the font size

fields.name: lineGap
fields.desc: vertical gap between lines in logical pixels

fields.name: paddingX
fields.desc: horizontal padding on each side in logical pixels

fields.name: anchor
fields.desc: vertical anchor ratio (0 top .. 1 bottom) the focus line centers on

fields.name: scrollDuration
fields.desc: scroll ease duration in milliseconds when the focus line changes; 0 snaps

fields.name: interludeText
fields.desc: placeholder text drawn for interlude lines

fields.name: activeColor
fields.desc: ARGB color of the active line
